---
title: "Apollo 11 Simulator"
subtitle: "C++ Project · Mar 2026"
---

## Overview

A simulation system modeling real-time flight variables with a modular object-oriented design and unit tests.

**Stack:** C++ · Object-Oriented Programming · Unit Testing

## What I built

- Modeled 5+ real-time variables to deepen algorithmic problem-solving and system behavior understanding
- Designed a modular OOP architecture with 10+ components for maintainability and isolated testing
- Wrote unit tests to validate simulation accuracy and reduce logic defects
- Improved performance and stability through iterative debugging and algorithm optimization

## Skills demonstrated

C++ · Simulation · Software architecture · Unit testing · Performance optimization
